name: Hayley Atwell
description: Hayley Atwell, a British actress born on April 5, 1982, has graced both stage and screen with her talent and captivating presence. Best known for her role as Agent Peggy Carter in the Marvel Cinematic Universe, Atwell has garnered acclaim for her versatile performances in film, television, and theater, showcasing a magnetic charm and depth in her portrayals. With a career marked by skillful acting and a strong screen presence, Hayley Atwell continues to be a prominent figure in the entertainment industry.
creator: deadcool
